description: Smart Insights is a new AI-powered analytics dashboard that provides real-time recommendations, trend analysis, and predictive metrics for PurpleMerit users. The feature includes a redesigned UI, real-time data sync, export capabilities, and personalized insight cards.
key_changes: New Smart Insights tab with AI-driven recommendations
Redesigned main dashboard UI with modern card layout
Export to PDF/CSV from any Insights chart
New onboarding flow for first-time Smart Insights users
Backend migration from REST polling to WebSocket streaming
Updated payment SDK to v3.8.1 for PCI compliance

known_issues.description: Smart Insights may crash on Android 13 devices with less than 4GB RAM due to memory-intensive chart rendering.
known_issues.workaround: Users can disable animated charts in Settings > Display.

known_issues.description: Intermittent payment gateway timeouts observed during peak hours (2-5 PM UTC) after SDK upgrade.
known_issues.workaround: Retry payment after 30 seconds. Issue under investigation with payment provider.

known_issues.description: API latency for Smart Insights endpoints is higher than target (p95 > 300ms vs 200ms target) due to unoptimized database queries.
known_issues.workaround: None. Engineering team is optimizing query paths.

known_issues.description: Onboarding tooltip overlaps with navigation bar on tablets in landscape mode.

rollback_plan: If critical issues arise, rollback to v4.1.9 is available via feature flag `smart_insights_enabled=false`. Database migrations are backward-compatible.
